
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• The unit-suite subprocess has the same wrapper issue after completion. I’m rerunning it with a long initial wait so the command can finish before the first yield and return cleanly.

• Ran ps -ef | rg "pytest tests -q --ignore=tests/smoke|python -m pytest tests -q --ignore=tests/smoke"
  └ luke           1       0  0 20:57 ?        00:00:00 bwrap --new-session --die-with-parent --ro-bind / / --dev /dev --bind /tmp /tmp --perms 555 --tmpfs /tmp/.git --remount-ro /tmp/.git
    --perms 555 --tmpfs /tmp/.agents --remount-ro /tmp/.agents --perms 555 --tmpfs /tmp/.codex --remount-ro /tmp/.codex --bind /home/user/Documents/code/murder /home/user/Documents/code/
    … +73 lines (ctrl + t to view transcript)
    luke           2       1  0 20:57 ?        00:00:00 /bin/bash -c ps -ef | rg "pytest tests -q --ignore=tests/smoke|python -m pytest tests -q --ignore=tests/smoke"
    luke           4       2  0 20:57 ?        00:00:00 rg pytest tests -q --ignore=tests/smoke|python -m pytest tests -q --ignore=tests/smoke

• Waited for background terminal · python - <<'PY'
import subprocess, sys
proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pytest', 'tests', '-q', '--ignore=tests/smoke'], cwd='.', text=True, capture_output=True)
print('EXIT', proc.returncode)
if proc.stdout:
    print(proc.stdout)
if proc.stderr:
    print('STDERR:')
    print(proc.stderr)
PY

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• The direct command wrapper is the problem now, not pytest. I’m switching to a tmux-backed run for the remaining verification so I can capture a clean exit and output without leaving
  zombie sessions behind.

• Calling tmux.create_session({"name":"plan-sync-tests"})

⚠ Automatic approval review approved (risk: low, authorization: unknown): Auto-review returned a low-risk allow decision.

✔ Request approved for MCP create_session on tmux

• Called tmux.create_session({"name":"plan-sync-tests"})
  └ Session 'plan-sync-tests' created on local.

• Calling tmux.run_command({"session":"plan-sync-tests","command":"cd /home/user/Documents/code/murder && python -m pytest tests -q --ignore=tests/smoke","blocking":true,"timeout":120})

• Reviewing approval request (12m 10s • esc to interrupt) · 4 background terminals running · /ps to view · /stop to close
  └ MCP run_command on tmux


› Find and fix a bug in @filename

  gpt-5.4 high · ~/Documents/code/murder
